environment: Industrial warehouse with powered industrial truck

hazards.hazard: Forklift forks lowered and extending unsecured into open floor walking area, creating a struck-by and trip hazard for pedestrians
No visible operator present on forklift, suggesting unattended powered industrial truck with forks in travel position on warehouse floor
No visible pedestrian walkway markings or barriers separating forklift operating area from general warehouse floor, increasing struck-by risk
Background shelving units appear to hold dense, heavy, and irregularly stacked materials; load stability and rack securement cannot be fully confirmed from this distance
Visible wear, rust, and surface degradation on forklift forks and mast carriage, which may indicate deferred inspection or maintenance of load-bearing components
Concrete floor shows visible debris and staining near forklift travel path, presenting a slip and trip hazard in an active vehicle zone
